case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. LEONARD JAY ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-26-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT LEONARD JAY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
